version_description: Version without capo, so that you can play along with the song.

versions.version_description: Easy version to play with a capo on the 6th fret. If you want to obmit the Em9 chord, take use of the SIMPLIFY function in the bottom menu.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bbm7[/ch]
[ch]Bbm7[/ch]         [ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Pullin' out the coupe at the lot[/tab]

Told 'em fuck 12, fuck SWAT

Bustin' all the bales out the box
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I just hit a lick with the box[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Had to put the stick in a box, mmh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Pour up the whole damn seal, I'ma get lazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                                              [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
I got the mojo deals, we been trappin' like the '80s[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
She sucked a nigga soul, got the Cash App[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Told 'em wipe a nigga nose, say slatt, slatt[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I won't never sell my soul, and I can back that[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
And I really wanna know where you at, at[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I was out back where the stash at[/tab]

Cruise the city in a bulletproof Cadillac (Skrrt)
[tab]                          [ch]Gb[/ch]
Cause I know these niggas after where the bag at (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Gotta move smarter, gotta move harder[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Nigga try to get me for my water[/tab]

I'll lay his ass down, on my son, on my daughter
[tab]          [ch]Gb[/ch]
I had the Draco with me, Dwayne Carter[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Lotta niggas out here playin' ain't ballin'[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I done put my whole arm in the rim, Vince Carter (Yeah)[/tab]

And I know probably get a key for the quarter
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
Shawty barely seen in double C's, I bought 'em[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Got a bitch that's looking like Aaliyah, she a model[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I got the pink slip, all my whips is key-less[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
Compton, I'm about to get the key to the city[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Patek like the sea, forget it[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Pullin' out the coupe at the lot[/tab]

Told 'em fuck 12, fuck SWAT

Bustin' all the bales out the box
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I just hit a lick with the box[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Had to put the stick in a box, mmh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Pour up the whole damn seal, I'ma get lazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                                              [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
I got the mojo deals, we been trappin' like the '80s[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
She sucked a nigga soul, got the Cash App[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Told 'em wipe a nigga nose, say slatt, slatt[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I won't never sell my soul, and I can back that[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
And I really wanna know where you at, at[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Hahaha, I been movin' 'em out[/tab]

It's still up with me then, he got the blues in the pouch (Yeah)
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
Took her to the forest, put the wood in her mouth[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Bitch don't wear no shoes in my house[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
The private I'm flyin' in, I never wan' fly again[/tab]

I'll take my chances in traffic (Yeah)
[tab]    [ch]Gb[/ch]
She suckin' on dick, no hands with it[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
I just made the Rollie plain like a landing strip[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I'm a 2020 president candidate[/tab]

I done put a hundred bands on Zimmerman, shit
[tab]       [ch]Gb[/ch]
I been movin' real gangster, so that's why she picked a Crip[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Shawty call me Crisco 'cause I pop my shit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Got it out the mud, there's nothin' you can tell me, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                                 [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
When I had the drugs, I was street wealthy, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Pullin' out the coupe at the lot[/tab]

Told 'em fuck 12, fuck SWAT

Bustin' all the bales out the box
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]
I just hit a lick with the box[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Had to put the stick in a box, mmh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Pour up the whole damn seal, I'ma get lazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                                              [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
I got the mojo deals, we been trappin' like the '80s[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
She sucked a nigga soul, got the Cash App[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
Told 'em wipe a nigga nose, say slatt, slatt[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
I won't never sell my soul, and I can back that[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Gb[/ch]               [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]

[Outro]
[ch]Bbm7[/ch]            [ch]Gb[/ch]      [ch]Fm/Ab[/ch]
